name: Shamoon Attacks on Saudi Energy Sector

victim.description: Saudi Aramco (35,000 workstations destroyed in 2012), RasGas Qatar, and other Gulf energy companies in 2016-2017 wave

infrastructure.description: Compromised contractor credentials for initial access; internal spreader module; wiper triggered by scheduled task

description: APT33 conducted destructive Shamoon wiper attacks against Gulf energy sector. The 2012 Saudi Aramco attack destroyed 35,000 workstations in hours. Later waves in 2016–2017 used updated Shamoon 2/3 variants with credential-harvesting modules.
